title: Croatian Paella Risotto
description: A twist on traditional paella, this dish incorporates the flavors of Croatia with a rich risotto. Perfect for a dinner party.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute.
Add the arborio rice and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine and cook until it is fully absorbed.
Add 1 cup of chicken broth and stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the petit pois and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
